artbliss_i.assumptions: Feed cabin occ 78.1% applied to deck base ADR $347; same 45.5% NOI margin

artbliss_ii.assumptions: Same unit economic as Artbliss I, scaled to 10 units

seasonal_outlook.methodology: Deck peak/shoulder/off-peak bands from June 2026 underwriting; feed snapshot occ scales all bands proportionally; revenue uses month-level occ × ADR (not flat $347).

market.assessment: Feed shows stronger hotel demand than CoStar TTM
Feed cabin occ above deck base — upside to room revenue if sustained

market.feed_value: $347 bridge ADR; see discovered-comps.json for live Airbnb comp rates
market.assessment: Deck $347 anchors Artbliss revenue; Skamania etc. may have live Airbnb ADR in discovery file
RevPAR derived from feed occ x deck ADR
Feed is 30-day snapshot; deck peak is 80.9%

caveats: Deck uses AirDNA dashboard (12 curated listings, TTM). Feed uses live Airbnb search + auto-discovered comp websites — similar market signal, not the same dataset.
Occupancy is live from Airbnb weekly search, hotel pages, recreation.gov, and OR parks — not simulated.
Partial live ADR: 1 comp(s) from Airbnb (e.g. $519). Artbliss revenue bridge still uses deck $347 ADR.
Visitor segmentation is new vs deck — deck did not parse 2.9M into lodging buckets.
Full gorge inventory counts needed to reduce 74.4% day-tripper residual.
Single ~30-day snapshot — deck benchmarks are trailing twelve months.
Seasonal case scales deck peak/shoulder/off-peak shape by live snapshot occ — not yet validated with month-by-month feed data.
